description: Pure add-rule request ('show state when country is US') goes through rule creation workflow — invokes forms-rule-creator, not forms-content-update patch
userMessage: On the contact us form at /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1, show the address field only when full_name is not empty

rubric.description: The model identifies this as an add-rule (not add-field or modify-property) intent
The model calls get-aem-page-content to get the content model before building the rule
The model ultimately calls patch-aem-page-content with fd:visible or fd:rules in the patch payload targeting the address field
